map.title: Ka Map Jingeh
map.subtitle: Peh ki jaka ba pang ha ka thain jong phi

dashboard.subtitle: Pynsngewbha tip halor ka koit ka khiah ki shnong jong phi
dashboard.villagesAtRisk: Ki Shnong ba don ha Khongpong

alerts.title: Ki Jingmaham Shnong
alerts.subtitle: Ki khubor bakhraw halor ka koit ka khiah bad ka um

report.title: Kumno phin pynmih?
report.subtitle: Jied ia ka jingujor jong phi
report.healthDesc: Ujor pang bad kumta ter ter ha iing phi.
report.waterDesc: Ujor ha kaba iadei bad ka um jakhlia bad kumta.
report.symptomsTitle: Ki dak pang aiu phi ioh?
report.severitySub: Kane kan iarap kumno ban leh
report.isWaterSafe: Hato lah ban pyndonkam ia ka um?

learn.title: Jingnang ka Koit ka Khiah
learn.subtitle: Hikai kumno ban yada ïalade bad ka shnong jong phi
learn.waterSafetyDesc: Kumno ban phiel bad kynshew um
learn.boilWaterDesc: Barobor pynshet ia ka um dih palat 1 minit ban pyniap ia ki khniang ba pynpang shhi um.
learn.emergencyDesc: Lada ioh ki dak pang shyrkhei, pyntip mardor sha jaka sumar ba jan.
learn.rememberDesc: Jingiada ka kham bha ban ia ka jingsumar. Sam ia kane ka jingtip.

hygieneQuest.pageSub: Pynbiang ki module baroh ban iashim ia ka community jong phi
hygieneQuest.mod1Text: Sah kti ha ka sabun bad ka um haduh 20 seconds — bynta hadien ba buh, hadien ban lah bathroom, hadien ba khiah.
hygieneQuest.mod2Title: Pyniap ka muh mynta ba khiah ne sneeze
hygieneQuest.mod2Text: Dei dei pyndonkam ka tissue ne ka jingkynmaw ka shong kti — bym dei ka kti ba la iap. Shong mask ha ki jaka bapom.
hygieneQuest.mod3Title: Ki vaccine ki dei ki cheat code jong ka met
hygieneQuest.mod3Text: Pynbiang ki vaccine na ka flu, typhoid, hepatitis, bad COVID-19 ban train ia ka immune system jong phi.
hygieneQuest.mod4Text: Dei dei sah ki fruit bad ki sabji ha ka um ba jingkynmaw. Thoh ia ka doh ba khraw shisha bad kynduh ha ka temperature ba safe.
hygieneQuest.tracker0: Pynbiang ia ka module khatba snem ban sdang ka streak!
hygieneQuest.tracker1: Bha ba sdang! Long sah kti shai shai 🧼
hygieneQuest.tracker2: Shi stap la wan! Phi dei u hygiene hero!
hygieneQuest.tracker4: Quest la pynbiang! Phi dei u Health Champion! 🏆
